human_actions_pending.context: Phase 2 plan exists (02-PLAN.md), ready to implement coordinators, sensors, config flow

decisions.decision: Three separate DataUpdateCoordinators for different update schedules
decisions.rationale: Each data source has different update frequency (hourly, daily, weekly)

decisions.decision: Three-step config flow with zone discovery
decisions.rationale: Validates API credentials, discovers zones, lets user select

decisions.decision: Four CoordinatorEntity sensors with MONETARY device class
decisions.rationale: Device class for proper formatting in HA, CoordinatorEntity for update handling

next_action: Execute Phase 2 tasks: Start with coordinator.py, then sensor.py, config_flow.py, manifest.json, translations
context_notes: Phase 1 is complete with data layer (models, API clients, exceptions). Phase 2 plan created with 6 tasks to add coordinators, sensors, and config flow. Ready to execute Phase 2 code implementation.
